_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: T265 cells were inhibited with an AC50 of 5.8 μM while STS26T cells were inhibited with an AC50 of 28.5 μM
details: UC1 inhibited T265 cells with an AC50 of 5.8 μM, showing greater sensitivity than NF1-positive cells
